# India News AI

## About
India News AI is India's first AI-powered live news platform. We provide verified, real-time breaking news covering Delhi NCR, Politics, Religion, Culture, and Weather.

## URL
https://indianewsai.com

## Categories
- Breaking News
- Delhi NCR
- Religion & Spirituality
- Politics
- Culture
- Weather
- Health

## Coverage Area
Primary: Delhi NCR (Delhi, Noida, Gurugram, Faridabad, Ghaziabad)
Secondary: Pan-India

## Content Type
Automated AI-curated and verified news articles with editorial oversight.

## Contact
Website: https://indianewsai.com

## Sitemap
https://indianewsai.com/sitemap.xml
